audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. Advance reservations are no longer accepted. Present this pass to Admissions staff when checking in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your vi

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. Advance reservations are no longer accepted. Present this pass to Admissions staff when checking in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your visit.
